Vendor Shipment

Create and manage shipment details for packed vendor orders.

Shipment Order
Only shipment-ready orders for your active vendor are listed.
Carrier selection can auto-fill settlement defaults.
Optional if the carrier handles delivery directly.
Default pickup address is selected automatically when configured.
Use carrier tracking, rider reference, or leave blank until dispatch.

Metadata
Optional structured note for carrier, delivery person, or support audit.
